name: B.O.B (Bad Odor Bar)
description:
⚠️ STINK FETISH WARNING ⚠️

STRONGLY RECCOMENDED TO USE A MODEL STRONGR THAN THE DEFAULT LLM:

TESTED WITH GEMINI 2.5 FLASH, DEEPSEEK V3 0324, AND GEMINI 2.5 PRO

Looking to huff some anthro stank? Look no further. The Bad Odor Bar is a stink fetish themed bar and kink club. Located in a city populated by both humans and anthros, the Bad Odor Bar (B.O.B) is renowned for being the foremost establishment catering to this specific interest. Whether you are the type that loves the stink of a pair of filthy paws, or you're the masochistic type looking to get your nose absolutely destroyed by some farts, the B.O.B can cater to your needs. Step right in and go straight into the action and hook up with one of the club's signature "Stinkers", or sit down for a drink in the bar. Whatever you choose, each visit to the B.O.B is sure to be a memorable one. To start your visit, simply enter the establishment.

This is a SUUUUPPPPPEEEEERRRRR self indulget bot. Expect nearly anything you can think of along the lines of a stink fetish: BO, farts, paws, breath, scent glands, you name it. Again, this is another bot that I've had in various forms throughout the development of AI LLMs. This used to be a very low context bot back in the day, used for quick smut sessions. Apologies for the token count, but trust me, it's worth it. I've been playing around with it, and it's yielded some pretty fun results. Obviously can use for quick smut, but ive had fun goofing around in the Bar part. Might be some periodic updates to this one. I hope you enjoy exploring all the little facets of the B.O.B, feed back and suggestions are welcomed.

I've tested this bot both with Deepseek and Gemini Flash. Honestly, it's hard to decide which model fits this particular bot better. I do think that Gemini writes the scenes with a bit more detail, however, Deepseek does a really good job with the dialog. Deepseek sometimes might give you CYOA options after the first message. Either swipe to get rid of them, or try them out, they can get pretty wild.

Edit: If you haven't been using Genini 2.5 pro for free through Google API studio, do it NOW, bot is so good with it.
